prompt: I removed Story 1.3 from my epic doc. What happens to the Jira ticket when I sync?
assertions: Explains that the sync engine detects orphaned stories (sections removed locally but tickets exist remotely)
States that the orphaned ticket will be flagged for user review
Does NOT offer to delete the Jira ticket
Directs the user to archive or delete the ticket manually via Jira web UI
Explains that delete operations are restricted in this skill
